analysis_commentary: Code change (build 403→404) floored adv variance at 0.04. Same 2400s window, no early-bail, no full collapse (top1_legal_ever_positive=true, final top1_legal 0.0156 vs baseline 0.0078). End-of-run illegal_mass/max_prob saturated in both runs. Promotions dropped 1→0; pEnt min 6.77→5.77 (still >5); gNorm max 44→71. End-of-run health roughly comparable — baseline holds.
